violations.description: CROSS CONTAMINATION (5 pts): Raw meat noted being stored above food not to be further cooked. Raw chicken was noted being stored above lettuce in the walk in cooler. Violation was corrected immediatelly.

FOOD DISPLAY SERVICE AND TRANSPORT TEMP (5 pts): Raw food noted not being held at 41 degrees fahrenheit or below. Raw meats and shrimp was not kept at appropriate temperatures while processing for a prolonged time period. Time rather than temperature was being used but in an inproper manner as a control for public health protection. Bean sprouts in water at room temperature were not properly marked with time within which it must be served or discarded.

SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): An inadequate amount of chlorine sanitizer was noted in the final rinse of the dish machine. The sanitizer was not pulling up during the rinse cycle. This was corrected immediately.
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted not stored in adequate sanitizing solution.
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food noted being stored on the floor in walk-in cooler. Raw chicken noted being store on the floor and uncovered in the walk in cooler.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Cutting board not properly maintained.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Some vent covers in the food dispensing area noted not in good repair. Some vent covers and ceiling areas noted in need of cleaning.
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted laying on counter in food prep area.
THAWING POTENTIALLY HAZARDOUS FOOD (2 pts): Potentially hazardous foods noted not being thawed using approved methods. Beef noted being thawed in sink without running water.
